title: Allow the auto number column to be supported at the subitem level.
excerpt:

posts.author: Supernova19 (Rosemary Laack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

For lengthy boards, especially those with numerous sub-items, using auto number can be extremely beneficial for reporting and review.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to achieve a standardized record number to reference in communications and collaboration. Again, it is significantly easier to reference, “Please look at Item 1-Sub 49,” than it is to say “Look at item 1. Then, open your subitems and scroll about halfway down the list until you find Acme Co.” It’s all about clarity and efficiency.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Supernova19

With a combination of the apps AutoID Column and AutoID subitems you can achieve exactly that. You can use the ID generated at item leven as a prefix for the ID generated at subitem level.
